title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Komurasaki, Unknown person #7, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #8 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way. His record isn't exactly good, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rumour has it that he challenged big mom and got his arm cut off by one of her subordi- nates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: after that, he tucked his tail and ran away...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Regarding that story about aiming for big mom's head...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I did was injure one of her sweet commanders to get what I wanted.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I lost this arm before that... during a battle with the red hair pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any- thing else that you want to know about me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will take down kaidou myself, and gain all the notoriety for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder what sort of a beauty will be passing through...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: forces from the capital are chasing us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is the end of the line....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we're going to die either way, then we're going to take you down with us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are some trouble- some looking guys over there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to be with you for- ever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh... with an old guy like me...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If... if I'm going to end up belonging to master Orochi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'd rather you be the one to free* me instead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But because of the ludicrous price on me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is nothing but an impossible dream....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...what I've just said.. if my words were to reach master Orochi's ears, then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Don't lose hope!! If that is what you desire...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I, bingou, will make sure it happens!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really? Even if you are lying to me, I am still so happy in this moment...:)

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 47 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
